# PH Geospatial Platform v2.2 — Independent Source of Truth Matrix
**Generated by:** Claude (independent derivation from all uploaded artifacts)
**Date:** 2026-06-07
**Scope:** All uploaded documents + zip release history

---

## SECTION 1 — Authority Hierarchy (My Derivation)

| Rank | Document / Artifact | Role | Why This Rank |
|------|---------------------|------|---------------|
| **P1** | `ph-geospatial-platform-byod-ready.zip` | Current release truth | Latest zip. All mechanical checks PASS. BYOD verdict PASS. 14 hardening fixes applied. 56 total checks verified. |
| **P2** | `ph_geospatial_platform_system_design_v2_2.md` | Architectural brain | 3888 lines. ADR-001–012. Sections 1–30 + Appendix C. Authoritative for all design decisions. |
| **P3** | `CORRECTED-SYSTEM-DESIGN-v2_2_1.md` | Diagram corrections | Fixes Mermaid syntax + 6 diagram edge errors in a variant LLM-generated design doc. Scope = diagrams only; does not alter architecture defined in P2. |
| **P4** | `master_plan_v2.2_final.md` | Procedural workflow | Derived from P2 Sections 1–30 + Appendix C. Defines per-day objectives, success gates, go/no-go conditions. Procedural authority within execution domain. |
| **P5** | `PH_Geospatial_Platform_v2.2_Day_by_Day_Execution_Plan.md` | Invocation layer | Converts master plan into resumable per-session invocations with halt/continuation checkpoints. |
| **P6a** | `project-audit-and-consolidation-report.md` | Baseline audit (Day 1–6) | Found 8 gaps, 3 P0 blockers (fitness_functions/, integration stubs, deploy_gate.py), missing PNG. 78% complete by artifact count at time of writing. |
| **P6b** | `final-verification-audit-Day7-EXTENDED-REMEDIATED.md` | Stage 5 re-audit | Post–Stage 4C remediation. FAIL verdict: 2 mechanical blockers (circular import, Airflow 3 compat). |
| **P6c** | `final-verification-audit-Day7-BYOD-READY.md` | Current validation state | Most recent audit. PASS — BYOD PRODUCTION READY. All 15 mechanical checks PASS. 14 BYOD fixes verified. 1 architecture FAIL (FAANG-03), 4 NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW accepted as debt. |
| **P7** | `ph_geospatial_explainer_llm.md` | LLM onboarding doc | Knowledge transfer. Never authoritative. Trails all other docs. |
| **P8a** | `ph-geospatial-platform-final-audited.zip` | Historical — FAIL state | Post–Stage 4C, pre–BYOD hardening. Audit verdict: FAIL (circular import + Airflow 3). Not for use. |
| **P8b** | `ph-geospatial-platform-remediated.zip` | Historical — intermediate | Stage 4C patches applied (tenacity, Prometheus, structlog, ARCHITECTURE.md, docstring fix). Superseded by P1. |

## SECTION 2 — File-by-File Role Map

| File | Status | Authority Domain | Can Override | Notes |
|------|--------|-----------------|-------------|-------|
| `ph-geospatial-platform-byod-ready.zip` | **Canonical** | Entire project | Yes — always | Contains docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, .env.example, docs/BYOD_GUIDE.md, geo_service/pipeline/extract/archive.py as new additions not present in older releases. |
| `ph_geospatial_platform_system_design_v2_2.md` | **Canonical** | Architecture | Only by newer blueprint or release | Governs ADRs, DDL schema, Airflow DAG spec, CI/CD pipeline spec, Docker spec, security constraints, SLO targets. |
| `CORRECTED-SYSTEM-DESIGN-v2_2_1.md` | **Active** | Diagram representation | Cannot override architecture | Corrects OTHER-VARIANT-LLM-SYSTEM-DESIGN.md diagrams, not the main blueprint. Scope narrower than SoT matrix implies. |
| `master_plan_v2.2_final.md` | **Canonical** | Operational workflow | Cannot change architecture | "Make it work → fast → right" 3-block structure. Day gates and go/no-go criteria live here. |
| `PH_Geospatial_Platform_v2.2_Day_by_Day_Execution_Plan.md` | **Active** | Execution / session invocation | Cannot change workflow | Resume checkpoints, halt conditions, per-day inputs/outputs. |
| `project-audit-and-consolidation-report.md` | **Historical** | Pre–Day 7 baseline | Append only | Superseded as validation authority by P6b/P6c. Still useful for gap history and conflict resolution record. |
| `final-verification-audit-Day7-EXTENDED-REMEDIATED.md` | **Historical** | Intermediate audit | Read only | FAIL state — relevant only to diagnose what the two blockers were. Superseded by P6c. |
| `final-verification-audit-Day7-BYOD-READY.md` | **Canonical** | Current validation state | Append only | Most recent audit. Use this to verify current release state. |
| `ph_geospatial_explainer_llm.md` | **Active** | LLM knowledge transfer | Never | Must be updated last after any change. Not an authority on anything. |
| `ph-geospatial-platform-final-audited.zip` | **Historical** | Archive | Never | FAIL verdict. Do not use as reference. |
| `ph-geospatial-platform-remediated.zip` | **Historical** | Archive | Never | Intermediate remediation state. Superseded. |

## SECTION 3 — Workflow Map (Blueprint → Execution)

```
ph_geospatial_platform_system_design_v2_2.md
    │  Defines WHAT: ADRs, DDL, pipeline spec, serving layer,
    │  security, observability, SLOs (Sections 1–30 + Appendix C)
    ▼
CORRECTED-SYSTEM-DESIGN-v2_2_1.md
    │  Fixes diagram errors in variant doc.
    │  No architectural changes to P2.
    ▼
master_plan_v2.2_final.md
    │  Defines HOW: Day 1–7 objectives, time budgets, gates.
    │  3 execution blocks: Make it Work / Fast / Right.
    ▼
PH_Geospatial_Platform_v2.2_Day_by_Day_Execution_Plan.md
    │  Defines HOW per session: invocation templates, checkpoints,
    │  halt conditions, resume instructions.
    ▼
ph-geospatial-platform-byod-ready.zip
    │  Defines WHAT EXISTS: verified implementation.
    │  All Day 1–7 code artifacts + Stage 4C remediation
    │  + BYOD hardening (14 fixes across 12 files + 3 new).
    ▼
final-verification-audit-Day7-BYOD-READY.md
    │  Verifies WHAT EXISTS against blueprint.
    │  PASS — BYOD PRODUCTION READY.
    │  1 architecture FAIL (FAANG-03), 4 NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW as debt.
    ▼
ph_geospatial_explainer_llm.md
    │  Translates WHAT EXISTS for human/LLM onboarding.
    │  Trails all above. Update last.
```

---

## SECTION 4 — Conflict / Inconsistency Report

| ID | Conflict | Documents Involved | Resolution |
|----|----------|--------------------|------------|
| **C-01** | Master plan audit context says "supersedes all other documents when conflicts arise." SoT matrix says Blueprint (P2) > Master Plan (P4) in authority. | `project-audit-and-consolidation-report.md` vs existing SoT matrix | **Not a real conflict.** The audit language refers to procedural/execution domain only. Blueprint governs architecture; Master Plan governs workflow. Domains are non-overlapping. Existing matrix conflict rule (Blueprint > Master Plan) is correct. |
| **C-02** | CORRECTED-SYSTEM-DESIGN-v2_2_1.md is described in existing SoT matrix as "fixes or clarifies blueprint details." Actually it corrects diagrams of a separate OTHER-VARIANT-LLM document, not the main blueprint (P2). | `CORRECTED-SYSTEM-DESIGN-v2_2_1.md` vs SoT matrix description | **Description mismatch.** P3's actual scope is narrower: diagram corrections for a variant representation, not clarifications to P2's architecture. Existing matrix overstates P3's authority relative to P2. Flag for update. |
| **C-03** | Existing SoT matrix has single P6 for "project-audit-and-consolidation-report.md." Actually three audit documents exist at different stages (P6a/P6b/P6c above). Two are absent from the matrix. | Existing SoT matrix | **Coverage gap.** Matrix does not track intermediate audit (EXTENDED-REMEDIATED) or final audit (BYOD-READY). Current validation state cannot be determined from the matrix alone. |
| **C-04** | Existing SoT matrix classifies all older zips together under P8. In practice `ph-geospatial-platform-final-audited.zip` has a FAIL verdict and `ph-geospatial-platform-remediated.zip` has an intermediate state. These are distinguishable. | Existing SoT matrix P8 | **Acceptable conflation.** Both are historical and should not be used. Distinguishing them matters only for regression debugging. Not blocking. |
| **C-05** | `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` exists inside byod-ready.zip (added by Stage 4C remediation, Action 5) but is not represented in any standalone document in the project file set. It contains ranked characteristics, coupling analysis, ADR index. | Stage 4C deliverables | **Not a conflict, but a coverage gap.** ARCHITECTURE.md is a derived artifact inside the release package (P1). Captured under P1 implicitly. No standalone tracking needed. |
| **C-06** | FoSA-01 in both audits lists ranked characteristics as "Availability (1) → Scalability (2) → Testability (3) → Deployability (4)." P2 blueprint ranks them differently: "Reliability (1) → Data integrity (2) → Evolvability (3) → Deployability (4) → Performance (5) → Scalability (6)." | `final-verification-audit-Day7-BYOD-READY.md` vs `ph_geospatial_platform_system_design_v2_2.md` | **Real discrepancy.** ARCHITECTURE.md inside the release package uses a different ranking than the blueprint's Section 2.1. Per conflict rule (Release > Blueprint if newer): ARCHITECTURE.md wins if it was written after P2 and intentionally revised. However, since it was auto-generated by Stage 4C remediation, this may be an unintentional deviation. Requires human review to confirm which ranking is canonical. |

---

## SECTION 5 — Change Management Rules (Verified)

### Architecture changes: update in order
```
P2 Blueprint → P3 Corrected Design → P4 Master Plan
→ P5 Execution Plan → P1 Release Package
→ P6a/P6b/P6c Audit Reports → P7 LLM Explainer
```

### Workflow changes: update in order
```
P4 Master Plan → P5 Execution Plan
→ P1 Release Package → Audit Report → P7 LLM Explainer
```

### Execution-only changes: update in order
```
P5 Execution Plan → P1 Release Package → Audit Report
```

---

## SECTION 6 — Conflict Resolution Rules

| Conflict Type | Winner | Caveat |
|--------------|--------|--------|
| Release (P1) vs Blueprint (P2) | Release if newer | Must be intentional override, not remediation side-effect |
| Blueprint (P2) vs Master Plan (P4) | Blueprint | Architecture domain wins over workflow domain |
| Master Plan (P4) vs Execution Plan (P5) | Master Plan | |
| Any Audit Report vs Design | Design | Audit documents findings; design governs decisions |
| LLM Explainer vs Any | Any other doc | Explainer has zero authority |
| New Release vs Old Release | New Release | |
| ARCHITECTURE.md (in P1) vs Blueprint Section 2.1 | Needs human review | See C-06 above |

## SECTION 8 — Verdict: Alignment Check vs Existing SoT Matrix

**Overall: Partially aligned. Hierarchy correct; coverage incomplete; one description mismatch; one real discrepancy.**

| Check | Existing Matrix | My Finding | Verdict |
|-------|----------------|------------|---------|
| Release package rank (P1) | Correct | Confirmed | ✅ PASS |
| Blueprint rank (P2) | Correct | Confirmed | ✅ PASS |
| Corrected Design scope (P3) | Overstated — "fixes blueprint details" | Diagram corrections for variant doc only | ⚠️ DESCRIPTION MISMATCH |
| Master Plan rank (P4) | Correct | Confirmed | ✅ PASS |
| Execution Plan rank (P5) | Correct | Confirmed | ✅ PASS |
| Audit report coverage (P6) | Single entry | 3 audit documents exist; 2 absent from matrix | ⚠️ COVERAGE GAP |
| LLM Explainer rank (P7) | Correct | Confirmed | ✅ PASS |
| Older releases (P8) | Correct — both historical | Correct; fine-grained distinction useful for debugging only | ✅ PASS |
| Conflict resolution rules | Mostly correct | Blueprint > Master Plan confirmed; Release > Blueprint if newer confirmed | ✅ PASS |
| Change management rules | Correct | Confirmed | ✅ PASS |
| Architecture characteristics ranking | Not addressed | Discrepancy between ARCHITECTURE.md (in P1) and P2 blueprint Section 2.1 | ⚠️ NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW (C-06) |
